evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implement automated testing, data documentation, and observability frameworks
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals (automated testing, documentation, observability, CI/CD) dominate with no velocity/speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: SaaS integration platform business context with ARR/churn as a nice-to-have, but no financial reporting or regulatory compliance language present.
evidence.data_team_maturity: the primary architect of our 'Gold' data layer
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named Gold data layer, semantic layer, and BI data catalog indicate an established data function with defined architecture.
evidence.jd_authorship: Hands-on experience with dbt / Coalesce and modern cloud data warehouses like Snowflake or BigQuery
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tools and architecture terms (dbt/Coalesce, Snowflake/BigQuery, Gold layer) give a concrete picture of daily work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Support semantic layer and BI data catalogs
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role centres on the Gold data layer, semantic layer, and BI catalogs serving internal data consumers rather than a specific commercial or finance function.
evidence.autonomy_level: the definitive owner of our business logic and the primary architect of our 'Gold' data layer
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: "Definitive owner" and "primary architect" are explicit direction-setting, strategic ownership language.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool or AI infrastructure mention appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.testing_framing: Implement automated testing, data documentation, and observability frameworks
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Automated testing and observability are named as an owned, implemented responsibility, not just a tool in a requirements list.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Implement automated testing, data documentation, and observability frameworks
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Observability and testing are a stated operational concern, but the JD frames this as pipeline/data quality rather than compliance or regulatory risk.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Develop and maintain scalable data models using dbt / Coalesce to transform raw data into clean, documented, and production-ready schemas
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role mixes developing new data models and Gold-layer architecture with maintaining existing schemas and pipelines.
